seo.title: InovaThings Brasil
seo.description: Custom software development, IT consulting, corporate data processing, and high-performance B2B web design with strong legal security.

hero.title: Software Engineering and Scalable Digital Solutions
hero.description: We develop robust architectures, tailor-made platforms, and provide strategic IT consulting to optimize and scale your business operations.

services.title: Services and Expertise
services.description: Complete technological solutions to boost and scale your business in the digital environment.

items.title: Custom Software Development
items.description: Creation and licensing of customizable and non-customizable software. We build platforms focused on your business domain, ensuring maintainability and high availability.

items.title: Infrastructure and Cloud
items.description: Data processing, hosting services, and application providers. We design infrastructures prepared for high concurrency and event processing.

items.title: IT Consulting
items.description: Specialized technical support and systems architecture. We assist teams in defining the best technical choices, from modular monoliths to distributed ecosystems.

items.title: Digital Experience and Web Design
items.description: Conception of corporate portals, e-commerce, and modern interfaces with a focus on usability and rendering performance.

portfolio.title: Product Ecosystem
portfolio.subtitle: Proprietary solutions and strategic alliances driven by Artificial Intelligence.

projects.title: NAT: Generative AI Engine
projects.description: Comprehensive LLM and Generative AI infrastructure integrable via API Gateway. We engineer custom models and scalable endpoints to orchestrate complex AI workflows within enterprise systems.

projects.title: SGCP: Authentication & Attendance
projects.description: Robust time and attendance management platform featuring high-precision biometric validation. Employs computer vision algorithms for fraud prevention and real-time record auditing.

projects.title: MEMO: Semantic Archive Management
projects.description: AI-driven document management engine. Applies advanced OCR and Natural Language Processing (NLP) to vectorize unstructured archives, turning them into highly searchable knowledge bases (RAG).

projects.title: Conectelegis
projects.description: Intelligent architecture tailored for the legal ecosystem. Automates operational workflows and applies predictive models for case analysis and semantic structuring of case law at scale.

projects.title: NatHealth
projects.description: High-performance digital ecosystem for the healthcare sector. Integrates AI models for optimized patient triage, predictive clinical evolution analysis, and smart allocation of medical resources.

about.title: Solid Engineering and Legal Security
about.p1: InovaThings Brasil acts as a high-level technological partner, grounding its operations in the strictest legal corporate rigor (CNPJ 65.301.520/0001-80). We are fully qualified for custom development, software licensing, advanced IT consulting, data processing, and cloud infrastructures, as well as B2B conversion-focused web design.
about.p2: Our deep technical capability is directly supported by our consolidated intellectual property, including active procedural registration with the National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI No. 922887810). These regulatory and operational pillars provide absolute legal and structural security for executing and sustaining critical corporate contracts and distributed systems.

inpi.title: INPI Registration
inpi.desc: Intellectual property guarantee for digital assets.

cnpj.title: Licensing
cnpj.desc: Operating in compliance with B2B software regulations.
